revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Specify}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | text = specify | title = {{delink|{{{reason|Statement needs to be more specific about the content to which it refers.}}}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = }}<!--{{Specify}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Articles needing more detailed references]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Specify}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | text = specify | title = {{delink|{{{reason|Statement needs to be more specific about the content to which it refers.}}}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = }}<!--{{Specify}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Articles needing more detailed references]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | text = specify | title = {{delink|{{{reason|Statement needs to be more specific about the content to which it refers.}}}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Articles needing more detailed references]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
